source_text:
Begin Main

StartScript EnableMenus
StartScript JTT_Init
StartScript JTT_SurvivalScript
StopScript Main

End Main

Begin EnableMenus

EnableMagicMenu
EnableInventoryMenu
EnableMapMenu
EnableStatsMenu
EnableRest
set CharGenState to -1

StopScript EnableMenus

End EnableMenus

Begin JTT_Init

short Done

if ( Done == 1 )
    StopScript JTT_Init
    return
endif

Set Done to 1
Set JTT_Hunger to 0
Set JTT_Warmth to 100
Set JTT_Wood to 0
Set JTT_Stone to 0
Set JTT_Iron to 0
Set JTT_Day to 1
Set JTT_PlayerInit to 1

player->AddItem "jtt_bone_club" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_tribal_loincloth" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 5
player->AddItem "jtt_bone_torch" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_stick" 3
player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 2

MessageBox "Jungle Troll Tribes! Chop Wood Groves for Sticks. Mine Stone Outcrops for Stones. Items go into your INVENTORY. Find a Workbench to craft weapons. Find a Build Site to build Campfires, Huts and Workbenches. Hunt for raw meat. Stay fed and warm!"

StopScript JTT_Init

End JTT_Init

Begin JTT_SurvivalScript

float HungerTimer
float WarmthTimer
float LastDay

Set HungerTimer to ( HungerTimer + GetSecondsPassed )
Set WarmthTimer to ( WarmthTimer + GetSecondsPassed )

if ( HungerTimer >= 300 )
    Set HungerTimer to 0
    Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger + 5 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger > 100 )
        Set JTT_Hunger to 100
    endif
    if ( JTT_Hunger >= 80 )
        MessageBox "You are starving! Find food!"
        player->ModCurrentHealth -3
    else
        if ( JTT_Hunger >= 50 )
            MessageBox "You are growing hungry..."
        endif
    endif
endif

if ( WarmthTimer >= 60 )
    Set WarmthTimer to 0
    if ( GameHour >= 20 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth - 5 )
    else
        if ( GameHour <= 6 )
            Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth - 5 )
        else
            if ( JTT_Warmth < 100 )
                Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth + 2 )
            endif
        endif
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth < 0 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 0
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth > 100 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 100
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth <= 20 )
        MessageBox "You are freezing! Find fire!"
        player->ModCurrentFatigue -15
    else
        if ( JTT_Warmth <= 40 )
            MessageBox "The cold bites at you..."
        endif
    endif
endif

if ( DaysPassed > LastDay )
    Set LastDay to DaysPassed
    Set JTT_Day to ( JTT_Day + 1 )
    MessageBox "Day %g of survival.", JTT_Day
endif

End JTT_SurvivalScript

Begin JTT_WoodNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This grove is fully harvested."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        player->AddItem "jtt_stick" 2
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Wood (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Wood (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "+2 Wood. Grove depleted."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_WoodNode

Begin JTT_StoneNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This outcrop is fully mined."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Stone (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Stone (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "+2 Stone. Outcrop depleted."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_StoneNode

Begin JTT_HerbNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This patch is picked clean."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 2
        player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_root" 1
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Berries, +1 Root (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Berries, +1 Root (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "Last harvest. +2 Berries, +1 Root."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_HerbNode

Begin JTT_Campfire

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "The campfire crackles." "Cook Food" "Warm Up" "Leave"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_raw_meat" >= 1 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_raw_meat" 1
            Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 30 )
            if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                Set JTT_Hunger to 0
            endif
            MessageBox "You cook and eat meat. Hunger reduced."
        else
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_jungle_berry" >= 3 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 3
                Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 15 )
                if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                    Set JTT_Hunger to 0
                endif
                MessageBox "You cook berries. Hunger reduced."
            else
                MessageBox "Need raw meat or 3+ berries to cook."
            endif
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 100
        MessageBox "The fire warms you fully."
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_Campfire

Begin JTT_Workbench

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Crafting Workbench" "Hatchet (2W+2S)" "Spear (3W+3S)" "Shield (3W+1S)" "Vine Whip (4W)" "Bow (3W+1Silk)" "Bark Armor (5W+2S)" "Leave"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_stone_hatchet" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Stone Hatchet!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Stone in inventory."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                player->AddItem "jtt_obsidian_spear" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Obsidian Spear!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3 Stone in inventory."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_bone_shield" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Bone Shield!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Stone in inventory."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 4 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 4
            player->AddItem "jtt_vine_whip" 1
            MessageBox "Crafted: Vine Whip!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 4 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_spider_silk" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_spider_silk" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_wooden_bow" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Wooden Bow!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Spider Silk (kill spiders)."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 5 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 5 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 5
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_bark_pauldron" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_hide_cuirass" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted: Bark Armor set!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Stone in inventory."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 5 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_Workbench

Begin JTT_BuildSite

short State
short Button
short Done

if ( Done == 1 )
    return
endif

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Build here?" "Campfire (3W)" "Troll Hut (6W+3S)" "Workbench (4W+2S)" "Totem Pole (3W+2S)" "Cancel"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
            PlaceAtPC "jtt_campfire" 1 0 128
            MessageBox "Campfire built! Approach it to cook food and warm up."
            set Done to 1
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 6 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 6
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_troll_hut" 1 0 256
                MessageBox "Troll Hut built! A shelter from the jungle."
                set Done to 1
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3 Stone in inventory."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 6 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 4 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 4
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_workbench" 1 0 128
                MessageBox "Workbench built! Use it to craft tools and weapons."
                set Done to 1
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Stone in inventory."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 4 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_totem_pole" 1 0 200
                player->ModCurrentHealth 10
                MessageBox "Totem raised! The spirits bless you. +10 HP"
                set Done to 1
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Stone in inventory."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Wood (sticks) in inventory."
        endif
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_BuildSite

Begin JTT_FastTravel

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Jungle Portal" "Base Camp (0,0)" "East Jungle (1,0)" "North Ridge (0,1)" "West Shore (-1,0)" "South Marsh (0,-1)" "Close"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        player->Position 4000 4000 220 0
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        player->Position 12500 4000 220 0
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        player->Position 4000 12500 220 0
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        player->Position -4000 4000 220 0
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        player->Position 4000 -4000 220 0
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_FastTravel

Begin JTT_TribalDrum

short Activated

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( Activated == 0 )
        Set Activated to 1
        MessageBox "The tribal drum strengthens your spirit!"
    else
        MessageBox "The drum still echoes."
    endif
endif

if ( Activated == 1 )
    Set Activated to 0
endif

End JTT_TribalDrum

Begin JTT_IronNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This deposit is fully mined."
    else
        Set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        Set JTT_Iron to ( JTT_Iron + 2 )
        player->AddItem "jtt_iron_ore" 2
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Iron Ore (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Iron Ore (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "+2 Iron Ore. Deposit exhausted."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_IronNode
